title: Cobblemon Amivena
description: My vision of the ultimate Create/Cobblemon modpack for having fun with friends.
body:
# Cobblemon Amivena: A Modpack Built with Love and Respect

I'm excited to share with you Cobblemon Amivena, a modpack that combines the best of Cobblemon and Create to offer a unique and immersive experience. As a fan of the Cobblemon community, I've tried to respect the spirit of the original mod while adding my own twist and creativity.

# A Blend of Favorites

Cobblemon Amivena is a collage of various datapacks, including some from the Cobblemon community, which I've carefully curated to create a rich and diverse experience. I've also added my own custom content, including a compelling storyline, custom Pokémon, and over 300 quests to keep you engaged.

# A Coherent Region

In the spirit of respecting the Cobblemon community's values, I've created a Pokédex that features 400 Pokémon, carefully selected to maintain a coherent and balanced region. This means that you'll encounter a diverse range of Pokémon that are native to the region, each with their own unique characteristics and habitats.

# Gameplay at the Heart

My focus has been on creating a modpack that's centered around gameplay, with a deep respect for the Cobblemon community's values. I've worked hard to integrate Cobblemon and Create in a way that feels seamless and immersive, with features like vocal interactions and a beautiful generation system.

# A Labor of Love

Cobblemon Amivena is more than just a modpack - it's a labor of love that I've poured my heart and soul into. I hope you'll enjoy exploring the world, battling Pokémon, and discovering the secrets that lie within. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to the world of Cobblemon, I hope you'll find something to love in this modpack.

Merci de me donner la chance de partager mon travail avec vous. J'espère que vous apprécierez Cobblemon Amivena !

Cordialement ,
bigtho80
